title: sorbus rupicola
intro: Sorbus rupicola, also known as the rock whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Sorbus rupicola is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
